description: Central manifest for machine-setup modes, tasks, dependencies, and tools.

modes.label: Automatic recommended setup
modes.description: Normal rebuild path for this machine.

modes.label: Custom setup checklist
modes.description: Choose individual setup tasks before running.

modes.label: Minimal recovery setup
modes.description: Enough to recover input, network, Git, winget, and MSVC.

modes.label: Apps only
modes.description: Repair winget and install configured desktop apps.

modes.label: Dev environment only
modes.description: Install developer toolchain pieces without general apps.

tasks.label: Install recovery drivers
tasks.description: Install exported Wi-Fi/touchpad recovery drivers when present.

tasks.label: Set PowerShell execution policy
tasks.description: Set CurrentUser execution policy to RemoteSigned.

tasks.label: Repair winget
tasks.description: Repair App Installer and winget enough for package installs.

tasks.label: Install Git
tasks.description: Ensure Git for Windows is installed.

tasks.label: Install apps
tasks.description: Install configured winget applications one by one.

tasks.label: Install MSVC toolchain
tasks.description: Install or modify Visual Studio for Desktop development with C++.

tasks.label: Install Microsoft Office
tasks.description: Run Office Deployment Tool download and configure steps from assets\office.

tasks.label: Install ScreenRec
tasks.description: Run the local ScreenRec NSIS installer silently when present.

tasks.label: Office post-install
tasks.description: Run optional local Office post-install script when present.

tasks.label: Install developer toolchains
tasks.description: Install fnm, Node/npm, Rust, Python/uv, Go, and Tauri when MSVC is available.

tasks.label: Apply Windows tweaks
tasks.description: Apply Windows Explorer, theme, power, and startup tweaks.

tasks.label: Install Windows updates
tasks.description: Install available Windows updates without automatic reboot.

tasks.label: Install Git config
tasks.description: Copy Git config and global ignore templates.

tasks.label: Install shell config
tasks.description: Copy PowerShell profile, oh-my-posh config, and Windows Terminal settings.

tasks.label: Install WSL
tasks.description: Install and configure WSL/Ubuntu when selected.

tasks.label: Run debloat
tasks.description: Optional removal of selected Windows bundled apps and ads.

tools.label: Export Wi-Fi/touchpad recovery drivers
tools.description: Export selected recovery drivers from the current Windows install.

tools.label: Cache offline recovery installers
tools.description: Download App Installer and Visual Studio bootstrappers for offline recovery.

tools.label: Prepare/update recovery USB
tools.description: Copy repo, drivers, installers, launchers, and docs to a recovery USB.

tools.label: Rebuild/slipstream Windows install USB
tools.description: Guided Windows install USB rebuild workflow.

tools.label: Diagnostics
tools.description: Show setup diagnostics and environment checks.

tools.label: Read instructions
tools.description: Open local recovery and setup instructions.
